query: brachytherapy unresectable locally advanced pancreatic cancer prospective trials

results.title: Yttrium-90 Radioembolization for the Treatment of Solitary, Unresectable HCC: The LEGACY Study.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 33739462. 2021/11/01 00:00. PURPOSE: This study aimed to retrospectively assess the outcome of interstitial 
iodine-125 brachytherapy for unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC).
MATERIALS AND METHODS: Between February 2013 and March 2019, 57 patients with 
108 unresectable HCC lesions treated with computed tomography (CT)-guided 
iodine-125 seed brachytherapy were retrospectively analyzed. The primary 
endpoint was overall survival (OS). The secondary endpoints included local tum
